name: Broken Hill Mines Limited
description: Broken Hill Mines Limited is an Australian mineral exploration and development company focused on discovering and developing high-grade base and precious metal deposits. The company's primary projects are located in the world-class Broken Hill mining district of New South Wales, Australia, targeting zinc, lead, and silver mineralization. Through modern exploration techniques and strategic landholdings, Broken Hill Mines aims to unlock significant value from its portfolio of prospective tenements.
